description: Composition Black boxer briefs made of 95% cotton and 5% elastane, has an elastic waistband with brand name, reinforced leg cuffs and seams and printed label on the inner Fit Comfort Wash care Machine wash with like colours using warm water Do not bleach Tumble dry low Do not iron hanes knows how to deliver basics which are practical, comfortable and stylish. Crafted using soft absorbent cotton/elastane blend fabric with duo-dry moisture management technology which helps the fabric contour your hips and allows you to stretch in ease. The printed label on the inner allows abrasion-free comfort while the superior stretch elastic offers easy leg movement. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and waist 32" The final product delivered might vary in colour and prints from the display here.
